entries.label: Version 3
entries.prompt: Audit this design system for readiness. Check DESIGN.md, brand.json, variables.css, theme.json, kit.html, kit.dark.html, generated artifacts, palette contrast, typography specimens, spacing/radius rules, and component coverage. Fix the highest-impact issues directly, keep the same registered design system id, and report remaining gaps before publishing or using it in other projects.
